restaurants.name: Hotel Abhi ruchi
restaurants.description: Hotel Abhi ruchi serves authentic Andhra cuisine with traditional recipes.

hero_slides.title: Welcome to Hotel Abhi ruchi
hero_slides.subtitle: Real taste of andhra — spices, soul, and tradition on every plate.

hero_slides.title: Signature Dum Biryani
hero_slides.subtitle: Slow-cooked layers of fragrant rice and authentic Andhra masala.

hero_slides.title: Dine In or Pickup
hero_slides.subtitle: Enjoy at our restaurant or order fresh food ready for pickup.

hero_slides.title: Fresh. Hot. Homestyle.
hero_slides.subtitle: Starters, biryanis, curries, and desserts made the Andhra way.

restaurants.address: Hotel Abhiruchi - Andhra Style Restaurant, Kittur Rani Chennamma Circle, 2044, 25th Cross Rd, Hebbal 2nd Stage, Mysuru, Karnataka 570016

restaurants.name: Biryanis And More
restaurants.description: Biryanis And More in Gachibowli serves signature biryanis, Chinese favourites, Sichuan specials, and fresh seafood. A local favourite with strong delivery ratings — approx. ₹900 for two.

hero_slides.title: Welcome to Biryanis And More
hero_slides.subtitle: Biryani, Chinese, Sichuan, and seafood — all under one roof in Gachibowli.

hero_slides.title: Signature Dum Biryani
hero_slides.subtitle: Slow-cooked layers of fragrant rice and bold Hyderabadi masala.

hero_slides.title: Chinese & Sichuan
hero_slides.subtitle: Noodles, fried rice, and spicy Sichuan bowls made fresh to order.

hero_slides.title: Fresh Seafood
hero_slides.subtitle: Prawns, fish, and coastal specials — perfect with biryani on the side.

restaurants.name: Pista House
restaurants.description: Pista House Gachibowli is known for Hyderabadi biryani, Middle Eastern plates, Mughlai curries, and fast-food favourites near Care Hospital. Open late till 3 AM — approx. ₹1,000 for two.

hero_slides.title: Welcome to Pista House
hero_slides.subtitle: Hyderabadi biryani, Middle Eastern, Mughlai, and North Indian — Gachibowli.

hero_slides.title: Hyderabadi Dum Biryani
hero_slides.subtitle: Aromatic basmati, tender meat, and the real taste of Hyderabad.

hero_slides.title: Middle Eastern & Mughlai
hero_slides.subtitle: Kebabs, haleem, and rich gravies crafted for late-night cravings.

hero_slides.title: Open Till 3 AM
hero_slides.subtitle: Dine in or order delivery — open now from noon through the night.

restaurants.address: 2-48, Plot 424, Opposite Care Hospital, Preston Prime Mall, Gachibowli, Hyderabad, Telangana 500032, India
